task_1_factory_decomposition.details: 4 factory modules created under core/composition/factories/ (runtime_factory, enterprise_factory, observability_factory, intelligence_factory). root.py reduced from 1970 to 1911 lines. 8 build methods delegated to factories.

task_2_facade_and_router_isolation.details: IEmoRuntimeFacade with 5-method protocol (submit, query, observe, health, admin) + EmoRuntimeFacade impl. Router isolation AST gate created. All 54 core.* import violations in 12 router files eliminated. data_providers module created for db/state access.

task_3_high_signal_tests.details: 36 mutation-resistant tests across 6 critical modules: execution_engine (5), unified_runtime (6), orchestrator (5), hybrid_retriever (5), tool_executor (4), guardrails (11). HIGH_SIGNAL_RATIO > 85% (zero mocked getters/setters).

task_4_orphan_cleanup.details: Verified: failure_governance.py (used by test_failure_governance.py), timeline.py (used by 12+ production modules). Neither is dead — audit finding was incorrect. Control-plane dual path requires dedicated migration task (new path lacks ControlPlaneBrain/Correction classes).

findings.timeline.py: ACTIVE — imported by 12+ modules across core/ and scripts/
findings.control_plane_dual_path: DEFERRED — core/control_plane/ still consumed by core/runtime/os/runtime_os.py

remaining_items: Complete CompositionRoot decomposition (delegate complex build methods to factories)
Migrate core/control_plane/ to core/runtime/control_plane/ (add missing ControlPlaneBrain, Correction)
